message:
fix: centralize hardcoded "beads" database defaults to configfile.DefaultDoltDatabase (bd-tcn)

Replace 3 hardcoded "beads" database name defaults in store.go and bootstrap.go
with the existing configfile.DefaultDoltDatabase constant, preventing code paths
from disagreeing on the default database name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
